debug_info.goal:
H : Type u_1
inst✝² : NormedAddCommGroup H
inst✝¹ : InnerProductSpace ℂ H
inst✝ : CompleteSpace H
a : H →L[ℂ] H
ha : IsSelfAdjoint a
x y : H
C : ℝ
f : ↑(spectrum ℂ a) → ℂ
hf_bounded : ∀ (x : ↑(spectrum ℂ a)), ‖f x‖ ≤ C
hX : Measurable f
⊢ ‖ComplexMeasure.integral (@cfc_toComplexMeasure H inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ a ha x y) f‖ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C

failed_attempts:
have hvar := cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y
  calc ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f‖ 
      ≤ C * (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ := by
        apply ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_of_bounded hX hf_bounded
      _ ≤ C * (‖x‖ₑ * ‖y‖ₑ) := by
        apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hvar
        by_cases hC : C ≥ 0
        · exact hC
        · push_neg at hC
          have : ∀ x, ‖f x‖ ≤ 0 := fun z => le_trans (hf_bounded z) (le_of_lt hC)
          simp only [norm_nonneg, nonpos_iff_eq_zero, norm_eq_zero] at this
          simp only [this, ComplexMeasure.integral_zero, norm_zero]
          positivity
      _ = ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C := by simp only [ENNReal.toReal_ofReal (norm_nonneg _)]; ring

have hvar := cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y
  calc ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f‖ 
      ≤ (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ * C := by
        apply ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_of_bounded _ hf_bounded hX
      _ ≤ ‖x‖ₑ * ‖y‖ₑ * C := by
        apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right hvar
        by_cases hC : C < 0
        · have : ∀ x, ‖f x‖ < 0 := fun x => lt_of_le_of_lt (hf_bounded x) hC
          exact absurd (norm_nonneg (f ⟨a.1 0, by simp⟩)) (not_le.mpr (this _))
        · linarith
      _ = ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C := by simp [ENNReal.toReal_mul]

have hvar := cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y
  calc ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f‖ 
      ≤ (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ * C := by
        apply ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_of_bounded
        · exact hX
        · exact hf_bounded
      _ ≤ ‖x‖ₑ * ‖y‖ₑ * C := by
        apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right hvar
        by_cases hC : C ≥ 0
        · exact hC
        · push_neg at hC
          have : ∀ z, ‖f z‖ ≤ 0 := fun z => le_trans (hf_bounded z) (le_of_lt hC)
          have : ∀ z, ‖f z‖ = 0 := fun z => le_antisymm (this z) (norm_nonneg _)
          linarith [norm_nonneg (f (Classical.arbitrary (spectrum ℂ a))), this (Classical.arbitrary (spectrum ℂ a))]
      _ = ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C := by simp [ENNReal.toReal_mul]

apply ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_of_norm_le (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y) hX hf_bounded
    (cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y)

have hvar := cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y
  sorry
